landing.title: MyFit
landing.description: Your intelligent companion for a healthier lifestyle. Track, analyze, and improve your wellbeing with data-driven insights.

login.title: Login
login.noAccount: No account found. Please sign up.

signup.title: Sign Up
signup.name: Name
signup.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.

profile.title: Complete Your Profile
profile.generateError: Failed to generate plan. Please try again.
profile.serverError: Error generating plan. Please check your server.

home.welcomeSubtitle: Your condition-aware plan is ready. Feel supported through every step.
home.proTipText: Consistency is key! Stick to your plan for at least 2-3 weeks to see noticeable changes. Use our AI coach for personalized advice whenever you need motivation or clarification.
home.conditionBannerText: Your plan is tailored to support your health condition with safer exercises and nutrition suggestions.

recommendation.noPlanText: Please complete your profile to generate a personalized fitness plan.
recommendation.pageSubtitle: Follow this customized plan to achieve your fitness goals
recommendation.conditionContent: Since you indicated {{condition}}, this plan includes safer exercise choices and dietary suggestions tailored for better health support.

healthTracker.title: Medication & Symptom Tracker
healthTracker.subtitle: Track your medication schedule and record symptoms so your plan stays safe and personalized.
healthTracker.fillRequiredMedication: Please fill all required medication fields.
